content:
🚀 Remote-PC-managment | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Remote monitoring and management of computers within a local network or over the internet.
✨ Key Features: • Agent management (registration, status monitoring, deletion) • Real-time shell/PowerShell command execution • File upload and download • System information gathering (OS, processes, services) • WebSocket for real-time communication
📖 Summary: This repository provides a full-featured system for remote monitoring and management of computers, featuring a Python/Flask server and a cross-platform Rust agent. It enables real-time command execution, file transfer, system monitoring, and administrative control through a web interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
